reference: THEN THE BRAHMAN TOOK PITY ON HIM AND OPENED THE CAGE DOOR BUT NO SOONER HAD HE DONE SO THAN THE TIGER JUMPING OUT SAID NOW I WILL EAT YOU FIRST AND DRINK THE WATER AFTERWARDS
text: Then the bramen took pity on him and opened the cage door, but no sooner had he turned over, than the tiger, jumping out, said, "Ah, I will eat you first and drink the water afterwards."
